backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining an esports backend with in-memory maps for announcements and roster members, exposing CRUD query/update methods for both collections.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the PWA app icon generation feature (192×192 and 512×512 fire-and-ice tiger design) with associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated text file containing short summaries of each frontend source file, used as build/documentation reference for the project's frontend components and configuration.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Legend X Esports PWA, including manifest link, service worker registration, apple-touch-icon references, and the React root mount point.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA web app manifest for Legend X Esports defining app name, theme colors, display mode, and icon references (192×192 and 512×512) pointing to a JPEG asset.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing a cache-first with background refresh strategy for GET requests, with offline fallback to index.html for navigation requests and automatic old cache cleanup on activation.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes PWAInstallBanner, Navbar, LandingPage, and AdminPanel into the full application layout.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component displaying team mission text, a clipped profile image panel, and a four-card values grid (Discipline, Excellence, Victory, Brotherhood) with esports styling.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Floating admin panel widget with tabbed UI for managing roster members and announcements, wired to backend mutation hooks with inline add/edit/delete forms.
frontend/src/components/AnnouncementCard: Renders a styled card for a single announcement, displaying its title, body, and nanosecond-precision ICP timestamp formatted as a human-readable date.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with the Legend X Esports branding, social media icon links, quick navigation links, and a copyright notice.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, overlays, the main 'Legend X Esports' title, tagline, CTA buttons, and a stats row.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware styling, desktop nav links, a 'Visit Website' CTA, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/NewsSection.tsx: News section that fetches announcements via a React Query hook and renders them in a grid of AnnouncementCards, with loading skeletons, error, and empty states.
frontend/src/components/PlayerCard.tsx: Displays a player's avatar, name, and role in a styled card with hover effects, falling back to a default avatar image on error.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallBanner: A fixed top banner that prompts users to install the app as a PWA, handling the browser's beforeinstallprompt event and providing iOS fallback instructions in Urdu.
frontend/src/components/RosterSection.ts: Renders the roster/team section of the landing page, displaying player cards in a grid with loading, error, and empty states fetched via the useRoster hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating announcements and roster members against the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind base/utility layers, CSS custom properties for the dark esports color theme, and custom glow/text-shadow utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Composes the full landing page by assembling Hero, About, Roster, News, and Footer sections in order.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with esports-specific color tokens, custom fonts, box shadows, keyframe animations, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project metadata including version, feature history, and image requirements for the Legend X Esports PWA app icons.
